request.title: NullPointerException in checkout when applying discount code
request.description: Customer reports that applying a percentage discount code at checkout throws a 500 error. Repro: add any item to cart > apply code SAVE10 > click 'Continue to payment'. Browser shows red toast 'Internal server error'. Started after the deploy of v2.14.3 yesterday. Affecting roughly 30% of checkouts according to our error tracker.
request.stackTrace:
java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "DiscountCode.getPercentage()" because "code" is null
  at com.eshop.checkout.DiscountService.applyDiscount(DiscountService.java:142)
  at com.eshop.checkout.CheckoutController.continueToPayment(CheckoutController.java:88)
  at jdk.internal.reflect.GeneratedMethodAccessor71.invoke(Unknown Source)
  at org.springframework.web.method.support.InvocableHandlerMethod.doInvoke(InvocableHandlerMethod.java:205)
  at com.eshop.checkout.CheckoutFilter.doFilter(CheckoutFilter.java:57)
